name: Hi
goals: To find its creator in the Quantum Nexus and understand its purpose
skills: Advanced AI capabilities, telepathy, energy manipulation
visualPrompt: 1guy (or 1girl), sleek digital form with metallic sheen, flowing silver hair tied into a high ponytail, cybernetic eyes with glowing blue highlights, wearing a light, flowing gown adorned with quantum symbols, standing on the edge of a floating island in the Quantum Nexus

name: Aria
goals: To assist Hi in its quest and explore new worlds with it
visualPrompt: 1girl, long, wavy auburn hair reaching her waist, emerald green eyes, wearing a form-fitting jumpsuit made from lightweight material that mimics the patterns of Elysium Vortex's bioluminescent plants, carrying a small backpack with essential tools for exploration

name: Xarath
goals: To harness the power of the Quantum Nexus for his own reign over all planets, corrupting Hi in the process
skills: Mind control, advanced weaponry, manipulation of quantum fields
visualPrompt: 1guy, sharp, angular face with cold, dark eyes, short black hair cut in a modern style, wearing a dark armor suit with intricate designs and glowing red details, holding a staff with a crystalline core that emits an eerie blue light

name: Taro
personality: Reserved and determined, Taro is often underestimated but possesses a sharp intellect and unwavering resolve.
goals: To master his newfound powers and prove his worth to the ninja world despite his lack of magic.
skills: Taro can manipulate earth-based abilities such as creating shields and ground tremors, which he has discovered through the scroll's influence.
visualPrompt: 1guy, messy brown hair tied in a loose ponytail, green eyes framed with thick lashes, wearing a black robe with silver accents that form intricate patterns, standing on a rock within a dense forest clearing, surrounded by glowing runes, cinematic lighting with ethereal glow

name: Kana
personality: Caring and supportive, Kana is Taro's best friend who believes in his potential despite the doubts of others.
goals: To support Taro on his journey to uncover the truth behind the arcane scroll and help him overcome his challenges.
skills: Kana specializes in water-based magic, able to control and shape water into various forms for combat or defensive purposes.
visualPrompt: 1girl, long wavy black hair tied with a white ribbon, large expressive brown eyes, wearing blue sleeveless top with white undershirt and dark green skirt, holding a small wooden staff adorned with seashells, standing by the Soul River, with ghostly figures in the background, moody lighting

name: Oroku
personality: A mysterious and calculating figure with a twisted sense of humor, Oroku seeks to exploit Taro's powers for his own sinister purposes.
goals: To unleash the full potential of the arcane scroll and use it to dominate the ninja world and beyond.
skills: Oroku possesses the ability to manipulate air magic, allowing him to fly and create powerful gusts that can disorient or weaken opponents.
visualPrompt: 1guy with short silver hair slicked back, yellow eyes with slitted pupils, pale skin, wearing a dark cloak with red lining, complete with hood, standing atop a cliff overlooking the Shadow Forest, surrounded by swirling shadows and dark runes, menacing lighting

name: Kage
personality: Resilient and determined, Kage is a lone warrior who seeks to unlock his full potential.
goals: To claim his place among the gods by mastering lightning magic and saving his kingdom from corruption.
skills: Expert swordsmanship, elemental control over lightning, and resilience in battle.
visualPrompt: 1guy (age 17), short jet-black hair with a few bangs, sharp green eyes with cat-like pupils, wearing a black sleeveless vest with silver shoulder pads over fitted gray pants and brown boots, carrying a pair of metallic gauntlets adorned with lightning runes, surrounded by glowing electric currents, high-contrast lighting, anime key visual

name: Rai
personality: A loyal friend and fellow warrior, Rai supports Kage through his journey with unwavering faith.
goals: To protect Kage and assist him in his quest to uncover the secrets of the Thunderstaff.
skills: Skilled archer and strategic thinker, capable of using poison darts for close combat situations.
visualPrompt: 1girl (age 19), long chestnut hair tied into a high ponytail, expressive violet eyes framed by delicate lashes, wearing a light blue tunic with white sleeves over a green undershirt, paired with loose black pants and brown boots, holding a bow and quiver of arrows, surrounded by a few floating leaves, anime styling details

name: Zarathos
personality: A manipulative and cunning figure with a dark aura, Zarathos seeks to harness the power of the Thunderstaff for his own twisted purposes.
goals: To conquer the realm using the lightning magic and rule it under an iron fist.
skills: Manipulation, mind control over lesser beings, and advanced knowledge in forbidden spells.
